songs.title: Nebular Ascension – Aura Vortex Style Tool
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[High-energy Progressive Psytrance (aka Prog Trance), with Full-On inflections. Inspired by Aura Vortex live sets. Designed for large festivals, outdoor stages, and spiritual high-energy dance moments.]

[MOOD:]
[Explosive, cinematic, psychedelic, euphoric, deep and trance-inducing.]

[TEMPO:]
[140 BPM, progressive build-ups, rolling drops, constant energy flux.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor, with modal shifts into Phrygian and Mixolydian for mysticism.]

songs.title: Free… Alive
songs.tags: The minimalist trance anthem opens with airy, high female vocals—breathy and sensual—repeating short, uplifting phrases over sparse, warm pads and subtle pulsing bass. The build layers crisp percussion and classic trance synths, swelling toward a pristine instrumental drop with shimmering arpeggios and euphoric melodies. For the final chorus, ethereal choir harmonies join, soaring above lush synth textures and deep rhythms, delivering an unfiltered, blissful peak before fading into a peaceful outro.

songs.title: The Best
songs.tags:
[Artist: Aviciii]
[Genre: Progressive House, Melodic House, Anthem House. The iconic sound of euphoric, stadium-sized dance music.]
[INSTRUMENTATION: The absolute centerpiece and heart of the track is a simple, beautiful, and incredibly catchy acoustic piano riff that provides the main melodic hook. A powerful, punchy, four-on-the-floor kick drum drives the track, creating a signature 'pumping' sidechain feel. The drop unleashes a massive, soaring, and euphoric layered supersaw synth lead that plays the main melody. The sound is often blended with organic, folksy elements like acoustic guitar strums.]
[VOCALS: A soulful, heartfelt, and often folksy male or female vocal. The delivery is crucial: it is emotional and genuine, with a touch of Americana or soul, not a generic, over-the-top diva performance. The voice carries the human, story-telling element of the track.]
[PRODUCTION: Polished,clean, and massive. The structure is a classic, patient build-up leading to a powerful,cathartic].

songs.title: SUNO 4.5 – Progressive House / Electro Pop / Cinematic Soundstage
songs.tags: Progressive house fused with electro pop and cinematic electronic aesthetics. Track opens at 120 BPM with ethereal pads expanding across the stereo field. Layered synths bloom gradually with filter sweeps and stereo movement. Intricate arpeggios move fluidly in rhythmic stereo oscillation. Drums are tight and electronic, supporting momentum without overwhelming the atmosphere. At 60s, an immersive drop introduces creative harmonic modulations and evolving timbres, blending melodic hooks with spatial depth. Vocal textures appear rhythmically, panned dynamically to add motion. Reverb and delay are finely tuned to simulate a multi-speaker soundstage, giving each instrument clear definition and location. The mix is balanced, with emotional buildup and cinematic release, designed to be captivating on stereo headphones.

songs.title: One Day Closer (To Home)
songs.tags: Duet: powerful, raspy female intro (Bonnie Tyler style, rock ballad, 82 BPM); transitions into ethereal trance female vocal (Sarah McLachlan/Tiësto style, 136 BPM). Track builds from cinematic, hopeful ballad to euphoric, uplifting trance. Lyrics tell a story of longing, survival, and moving closer to peace/home—perfect for a returning soul or soldier. Instrumentation shifts from piano/guitar/drums to melodic trance synths, pads, and rolling bass. Seamless tempo and energy change. NO autotune, pop/EDM clichés, or digital coldness—only heartfelt vocals, real emotion, and pure trance journey.

songs.title: Progressive House, Electro Pop, Cinematic Electronic
songs.tags: This progressive house/electro pop track opens at 120 BPM with airy, expressive pads and layered synths unfolding across the stereo field. Intricate arpeggios weave through tight, electronic drums. At 60 seconds, an immersive drop features creative chord shifts and evolving timbres, maintaining tension with unexpected harmonies and rhythmic vocal textures. Each element is spatially placed for maximum clarity, mimicking a multi-speaker cinematic soundstage and keeping the sonics engaging and captivating throughout.

songs.title: One Day Closer (To Home)
songs.tags: Duet: powerful, raspy female intro (Bonnie Tyler style, rock ballad, 82 BPM); transitions into ethereal trance female vocal (Sarah McLachlan/Tiësto style, 136 BPM). Track builds from cinematic, hopeful ballad to euphoric, uplifting trance. Lyrics tell a story of longing, survival, and moving closer to peace/home—perfect for a returning soul or soldier. Instrumentation shifts from piano/guitar/drums to melodic trance synths, pads, and rolling bass. Seamless tempo and energy change. NO autotune, pop/EDM clichés, or digital coldness—only heartfelt vocals, real emotion, and pure trance journey.

songs.title: Delerium
songs.tags: Female vocal, trance classic style—ethereal, emotional, long notes, soft but expressive. Progressive trance: melodic arpeggios, lush pads, rolling bass, clean kick, atmospheric sweeps. Wide stereo, long reverb/delay, slow build to euphoric drop. Lyrics dreamlike and introspective, focus on transcendence, peace, and freedom. Influences: T iësto (“Silence” Remix), Delerium, Chicane, Above & Beyond (early). NO autotune, pop drops, rap, EDM clichés, or digital harshness—just classic trance purity.

songs.title: Evergreen (Remix)
songs.tags:
[style: Fusion of melodic techno, progressive house and cinematic ambient with modal harmony]
[tempo: 126 BPM | time signature: 4/4]
[structure: Intro – Verse – Build – Drop – Breakdown – Vintage Bridge – Drop 2 – Outro]

[instructions]
– Use two vocal types:

Main: soft, ethereal female voice (AURORA / F K A twigs / B jörk inspired)

Bridge: powerful 80s-style female vocal (Bonnie Tyler / S tevie Nicks inspired)

– Apply reverse FX, granular delay, vocoder and stereo diffusion to ethereal voice, – Dramatic vocal in bridge should be dry, emotional, reverb-heavy, no autotune, – Insert ambient choirs and drone textures that obscure some phrases intentionally, – All vocals must follow provided rhythmic phrasing and enter on correct beats, – Guitars accompany the vintage bridge section (emotive bend solo + clean arpeggios), Avoid clear pop phrasing, upbeat tone, major key progressions, trap kits, or clean vocal tuning, Keep the tone mysterious, emotional, cinematic, layered, and modal

songs.title: SUNO 4.5 – Progressive House / Electro Pop / Cinematic Soundstage
songs.tags: Progressive house fused with electro pop and cinematic electronic aesthetics. Track opens at 120 BPM with ethereal pads expanding across the stereo field. Layered synths bloom gradually with filter sweeps and stereo movement. Intricate arpeggios move fluidly in rhythmic stereo oscillation. Drums are tight and electronic, supporting momentum without overwhelming the atmosphere. At 60s, an immersive drop introduces creative harmonic modulations and evolving timbres, blending melodic hooks with spatial depth. Vocal textures appear rhythmically, panned dynamically to add motion. Reverb and delay are finely tuned to simulate a multi-speaker soundstage, giving each instrument clear definition and location. The mix is balanced, with emotional buildup and cinematic release, designed to be captivating on stereo headphones.

songs.title: Amnesia Nights
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Balearic Techno / Progressive House]

[MOOD:]
[Hypnotic, euphoric, sunrise-to-sunset energy]

[INSTRUMENTATION:]
[deep rolling basslines, layered tribal percussion, airy pads, short synth stabs, rapid arpeggios]

[TEMPO:]
[124 BPM, loop intent 8s multiples]

[PRODUCTION:]
[layered polyrhythmic swaps every 8 bars, 3D surround sweeps, vocal chops whispered in Spanish]

[SPATIAL_POLYRHYMIC_DESIGN]
[Foundation: kick+bass locked center 4/4
Percussion: congas 3/4 orbit front-left→back-right
Arp: 7/8 ping‑pong around listener
Whispers: Spanish phrases orbit 360° with long reverb tails]

[STRUCTURE:]
[Intro → Build (swap every 2–8 bars) → Drop 1 → Breakdown → Drop 2 → Outro — ensure seamless loop at 8s boundary]

songs.title: Tomorrowland ou Ultra Music Festival
songs.tags: An explosive, high-energy electronic festival track designed for mainstage performance. Fuses euphoric progressive house with emotional melodic EDM, layered with lush arpeggiated synths, cinematic build-ups, sidechained pads, and punchy drums. Includes atmospheric vocal chops, stretched phrases, and rhythmic chants processed for ambiance and intensity. Perfect for large-scale crowd immersion and emotional elevation. Influenced by Martin Gar rix, I llenium, and A lesso. Designed to deliver powerful drops, transcendent breakdowns, and stadium-sized dynamics. Focused entirely on the electronic experience: immersive, anthemic, rhythmic, and emotionally liberating — pure dancefloor energy.

songs.title: EU, A CORAGEM
songs.tags:
[CHARACTER / ESSENCE CONTEXT:]
[Entity: Courage (Coragem) — consciousness of stepping forward despite fear, expansion through surrender.]
[Voice timbre: androgynous, resonant chest mixed with airy head tone, slight rasp on sustain.]
[Emotion: self-reflection, strength, vulnerability, liberation.]

[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Cinematic Progressive House | Tribal Electronica | designed as a march toward inner freedom.]
[INFLUENCE:]
[Hans Zimmer’s brass swells | Tale Of Us progressive groove | tribal house drums | Sigur's Rós emotional openness.]

songs.title: Rolltop Bath & Skylight
songs.tags: A 5–6 min instrumental in melodic house/progressive house style at 128 BPM, opening with an energetic toms riff, spacious field recordings, and snares. Bouncy kick and wub bass anchor a deep groove, growing through evolving melodic motifs and glitched textures. Subtle hi-hats and gentle percussion ride across evolving chordal pads and soft, robotic vocal fragments. Each section adds melodic flourishes, arpeggiated synths, and harmonic movement, culminating in a lush, cerebral sonic peak before unwinding to sparse atmospheres and quiet, resonant fades.

songs.tags: A fusion of minimal techno and progressive house at 124-128 BPM, building hypnotic momentum with evolving percussive layers, subtly modulated synths, and rich, warm melodic motifs. Deep, driving basslines anchor the rhythm. Atmospheric pads and filtered FX add dimension as each section unfolds.

songs.tags: A fusion of minimal techno and progressive house at 124-128 BPM, building hypnotic momentum with evolving percussive layers, subtly modulated synths, and rich, warm melodic motifs. songs.title: melodic techno / progressive house / psychedelic
songs.tags: This composition blends minimal techno, progressive house, and psychedelic ambient with modal harmony (Dorian or Lydian). The primary vocal is a soft, fragmented female voice inspired by AURORA, F K A twigs, and B jörk — whispered, breathy, often layered or masked by ambient choirs and drones. At the emotional peak, all electronic elements pause to reveal a powerful, vintage-style 80s female vocal (à la Bonnie Tyler), accompanied by a dramatic guitar duet — one sustaining and expressive, the other rhythmic and clean. This analog interlude bridges into a return of the electronic groove, now transformed. The sound design relies on evolving arpeggios, deep basslines, atmospheric pads, granular textures, and immersive spatial effects, creating a cinematic, hypnotic, emotionally ambiguous soundscape.

songs.title: VOCAL PROMPT (Fragmented Memories)
songs.tags:
[style: Fusion of melodic techno, progressive house and cinematic ambient with modal harmony]
[tempo: 126 BPM | time signature: 4/4]
[structure: Intro – Verse – Build – Drop – Breakdown – Vintage Bridge – Drop 2 – Outro]

[instructions]
– Use two vocal types:

Main: soft, ethereal female voice (AURORA / F K A twigs / B jörk inspired)

Bridge: powerful 80s-style female vocal (Bonnie Tyler / S tevie Nicks inspired)

– Apply reverse FX, granular delay, vocoder and stereo diffusion to ethereal voice.
– Dramatic vocal in bridge should be dry, emotional, reverb-heavy, no autotune.
– Insert ambient choirs and drone textures that obscure some phrases intentionally.
– All vocals must follow provided rhythmic phrasing and enter on correct beats.
– Guitars accompany the vintage bridge section (emotive bend solo + clean arpeggios).

[MOOD: Hypnotic, euphoric, sunrise-to-sunset energy]
[INSTRUMENTATION: deep rolling basslines, layered tribal percussion, airy pads, short synth stabs, rapid arpeggios]
[PRODUCTION: layered polyrhythmic swaps every 8 bars, 3D surround sweeps, vocal chops whispered in Spanish]

songs.title: Amnesia Nights
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Balearic Techno / Progressive House]

[MOOD:]
[Hypnotic, euphoric, sunrise-to-sunset energy]

[INSTRUMENTATION:]
[deep rolling basslines, layered tribal percussion, airy pads, short synth stabs, rapid arpeggios]

[TEMPO:]
[124 BPM, loop intent 8s multiples]

[PRODUCTION:]
[layered polyrhythmic swaps every 8 bars, 3D surround sweeps, vocal chops whispered in Spanish]

[SPATIAL_POLYRHYMIC_DESIGN]
[Foundation: kick+bass locked center 4/4
Percussion: congas 3/4 orbit front-left→back-right
Arp: 7/8 ping-pong around listener
Whispers: Spanish phrases orbit 360° with long reverb tails]

[STRUCTURE:]
[Intro → Build (swap every 2–8 bars) → Drop 1 → Breakdown → Drop 2 → Outro — ensure seamless loop at 8s boundary]
